tagline: Your trades follow the best. Near-instant. Zero trust.

page_1_home.name: Home
page_1_home.purpose: Explain the product, show live on-chain activity, convert visitors to users

hero: Headline and one-liner explaining copy-trading concept
Two primary actions: 'Become a Leader' navigates to /trade, 'Start Following' navigates to /leaderboard
Display total protocol stats: number of active leaders, number of active followers, total mirrored volume
how_it_works: Step 1: Leader trades on the DEX
Step 2: Trades are automatically mirrored to all followers near-instantly — no bots, fully on-chain
Step 3: Stop-loss protection auto-fires if a follower's losses exceed their threshold
Emphasize: zero off-chain infrastructure, powered by Somnia Reactivity
live_mirror_feed: Real-time scrolling feed of copy-trades happening on-chain right now
Each entry shows: follower (truncated address), leader (truncated address), token pair swapped, amount mirrored, time ago
Empty state message when no recent activity
live_stats_bar: Persistent stats bar: active leaders count, active followers count, 24h mirrored volume
Numbers update in real-time as activity happens

page_2_leaderboard.name: Leaderboard
page_2_leaderboard.wallet_required_for: following a leader or registering as a leader
page_2_leaderboard.purpose: Browse and compare leaders by performance, follow the best ones

leader_table: Table of all registered leaders, ranked by performance score
Columns: rank, address (truncated), score, win rate %, total profit/loss, total volume traded, number of followers, last trade time
Sortable by: score (default), win rate, profit/loss, volume, follower count
Each row is clickable to expand and see leader details
Pagination or infinite scroll for many leaders
leader_detail_expanded: Shown when a leader row is clicked — inline expansion or modal
Full address, amount staked, registration date
Score breakdown: 60% win rate + 20% volume + 20% recency
Follower count and total capital following them
'Follow This Leader' button — prompts wallet connection if not connected
follow_flow: If wallet not connected: prompt wallet connection first
Modal with input fields: deposit amount, max amount per trade, slippage tolerance (percentage), stop-loss threshold
Show user's current token balance for reference
Validation: all fields must be > 0, slippage between 0.01% and 100%
User confirms, two transactions execute (token approval then follow)
Show transaction progress: pending → confirmed → success
On success: show confirmation and option to go to /trade to manage position
become_a_leader: Button or section for 'Become a Leader'
Input: stake amount (minimum 10 STT native tokens — skin in the game)
On success: leader appears in table, option to go to /trade to start trading

page_3_trade.name: Trade
page_3_trade.purpose: Leaders execute trades and manage stats. Followers manage positions and monitor activity. Single page for both roles.

role_detection: On page load, detect connected wallet's role: leader, follower, both, or neither
Show leader panel if user is a registered leader
Show follower panel if user is following any leaders
If neither: show prompt to register as leader or go to /leaderboard to follow someone
leader_swap_panel: Token pair selector: pick token to sell and token to buy (available: STT, USDC, WETH)
Show estimated output and price impact before confirming
User confirms, two transactions (approval then swap)
Note displayed: 'Your followers will automatically mirror this trade'
leader_stats_panel: Display: your score, total trades, win rate, total profit/loss, total volume
Display: number of followers currently copying you
Display: pending performance fees available to claim
'Deregister' button — unstakes and removes leader status, with confirmation warning
follower_active_positions: List of all leaders the user is currently following
Per leader card: leader address, amount deposited remaining, max per trade setting, slippage setting, stop-loss threshold, current unrealized profit/loss
Visual warning indicator when approaching stop-loss threshold (e.g. losses at 80%+ of threshold)
deposit_more_flow: Triggered by 'Deposit More' on a position
Show current balance and current deposit for reference
withdraw_flow: Input: amount to withdraw (cannot exceed deposited amount)
unfollow_flow: Confirmation prompt: warns that all remaining deposit will be returned and mirroring will stop
On success: remove position from list
trade_feed: Real-time feed of mirrored trades relevant to the connected user
For leaders: shows trades that your followers mirrored from you
For followers: shows trades that were mirrored into your positions
Each entry: timestamp, leader, token pair, mirrored amount, output received
Also show failed mirror attempts with reason
risk_alerts: When a position is auto-closed by stop-loss: show alert with which leader, the realized loss, and amount of tokens returned
Persist recent alerts during the session

wallet_connection: Connect wallet button in header, visible on all pages
Auto-detect wrong network and prompt switch to Somnia Shannon Testnet
When connected: show truncated address and native token balance in header
real_time: All live data updates via WebSocket — never polling
Events pushed to frontend as they happen on-chain
